WPP_STICKERS.CooldownWarning: Please wait {seconds}s before sending another sticker.

Settings.ShowOnCanvasHint: When a sticker is sent in chat, also display it on the game canvas with a pop-in/fade-out animation.
Settings.CanvasDurationHint: How long stickers remain visible on the canvas before fading out.
Settings.StickerSizeHint: The display size for stickers in chat and on the canvas.
Settings.StickerCooldownHint: Minimum time between sending stickers to prevent spam. Set to 0 to disable.
Settings.ManagePacksHint: Upload, organize, and delete sticker packs.

PackManager.Title: Sticker Pack Manager
PackManager.Description: Create sticker packs and upload images. Supported formats: PNG, WebP, GIF, JPEG, AVIF.
PackManager.InvalidName: Invalid pack name. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens.
PackManager.PackExists: A pack with that name already exists.
PackManager.DeletePackConfirm:
Are you sure you want to delete the sticker pack {name}?

This will remove the pack configuration. Uploaded files will remain on the server.
PackManager.EmptyPack: No stickers yet. Click the upload button to add some!
PackManager.NoPacks: No sticker packs configured. Click "New Pack" to get started.

Picker.NoPacks: No sticker packs available. Ask your GM to add some in Module Settings.
